findings.evidence: `@[expose] noncomputable def characteristicWeight (k x : V → ℤ) : ℤ := -(P.characteristicWeightNumerator k x / 2)` has no characteristic hypothesis, while `two_mul_characteristicWeight` at lines 101-104 requires `(hk : P.IsCharacteristicVector k)`.
findings.fix: Revise the docstring to say the definition is the integer-division expression for arbitrary `k`, and that it agrees with the exact characteristic weight when `k` is characteristic via `two_mul_characteristicWeight`.
findings.issue: The docstring presents `characteristicWeight` as the exact half `χ_k(x) = -(⟨k, x⟩ + x · x) / 2`, but the public definition at line 93 accepts any `k : V → ℤ` and uses integer division; exact halving is only justified under `P.IsCharacteristicVector k`.

summary: The new file has module and declaration docstrings, but the main `characteristicWeight` documentation overstates what the public definition guarantees for arbitrary covectors.
